name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America Fort Mill, South Carolina — Advance America offers payday loans ($100-$500), installment loans (up to $1,000), and title loans (up to $2...
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender specializing in short-term emergency cash solutions. The company operates physical storefronts across multiple states, including a Jacksonville, FL location at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave., and also provides online lending options. The company has been established as a trusted provider of fast cash loans for consumers facing immediate financial needs.

Advance America offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans ($100-$500) designed as two- to four-week short-term loans between paychecks; Installment Loans ($100-$1,000) allowing repayment over multiple payments with longer terms than payday loans; and Title Loans ($2,000-$25,000 online) using vehicle equity as collateral. The Jacksonville store operates extended hours (10am-6pm weekdays, 9am-4pm Saturday, closed Sundays) and provides bilingual service ("Hablamos español"). Customers can apply online or in-store, with same-day personal loans available up to $1,000.

Advance America distinguishes itself through high customer ratings (4.9 out of 5 stars based on 125,448 reviews on Google) and staff described as knowledgeable and helpful in explaining loan processes. The company offers additional services including Western Union money transfer and claims full accreditation as a nationally recognized lender. The in-store experience appears customer-focused based on testimonials highlighting staff going "above and beyond."

However, as a traditional payday and title lender, Advance America products carry the inherent limitations of this category: likely high APR rates (not disclosed on the website), relatively small unsecured loan amounts, and short repayment periods that can trap borrowers in debt cycles. Title loans specifically put vehicle ownership at risk. The company does not appear to offer credit-building features or alternatives to traditional payday lending, and applicants must have a checking account and verifiable income.
pros: Same-day funding available for loans up to $1,000
Loan amounts up to $25,000 for title loans based on vehicle value
Extended store hours including Saturday morning (9am opening) and weekday evenings (until 6pm)
Bilingual staff available (Spanish language support mentioned)
Multiple loan product options (payday, installment, title) allowing flexibility based on borrowing need
High customer satisfaction rating: 4.9/5 stars from 125,448 Google reviews
Online application option available in addition to in-store applications
Western Union money transfer services available at store location
cons: APR rates and total cost of borrowing not disclosed on website, suggesting potentially high fees
Title loans put vehicle ownership at risk if borrower defaults
Installment loans capped at $1,000 ($500 for payday loans) may be insufficient for larger emergencies
Requires checking account to qualify, excluding unbanked consumers
No mention of credit-building features or financial counseling to help escape debt cycles
best_for: Employed individuals with immediate cash needs between paychecks who have checking accounts
Vehicle owners needing larger emergency funds ($2,000+) and willing to use car title as collateral
Consumers requiring same-day or next-day cash access without credit checks
Spanish-speaking borrowers in Jacksonville seeking bilingual loan services
diagnosis: Advance America is best for employed individuals with checking accounts who need emergency cash within days and are comfortable with short repayment terms or vehicle-backed collateral. The main caveat is that these products typically carry high APRs and short payoff periods that can create debt cycles; borrowers should carefully review all fees and terms before applying, and only use title loans if they can afford to lose vehicle access.
services: Installment loans ($100-$1,000 with extended repayment periods)
Title loans ($2,000-$25,000 using vehicle as collateral)
Store locations with extended hours (10am-6pm weekdays, 9am-4pm Saturday)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
